---
title: "News Coverage about the U.S. in Korea during Bush, Obama and Trump Administration: Trump as an Outlier"
date: 2021-01
author:
  - name: Hyelim Lee
    url: https://scholar.google.co.kr/citations?user=GnvwjTUAAAAJ&hl=en
    orcid: 0000
    affiliation: University of Oklahoma
  - name: Seulgi Jang
    url: https://scholar.google.co.kr/citations?user=-Sn2BXYAAAAJ&hl=ko
    orcid: 0000
    affiliation: Seoul National University
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [Korea, 2021]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    Hyelim Lee, Seulgi Jang, and <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan*</strong> (2021), “News Coverage about the U.S. in Korea during Bush, Obama and Trump Administration: Trump as an Outlier,” in Yahya R. Kamalipour (ed.) <em>Global Media Perceptions of the United States: The Trump Effect</em> (pp. 175-178), Rowman & Littlefield Publishing <a href="https://rowman.com/ISBN/9781538142417/Global-Media-Perceptions-of-the-United-States-The-Trump-Effect"><code>link</code></a>
#image:
#draft: true
---

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@incollection{lee_news_2021,
    title = {News Coverage about the U.S. in Korea during Bush, Obama and Trump Administration: Trump as an Outlier},
    url = {https://rowman.com/ISBN/9781538142417/Global-Media-Perceptions-of-the-United-States-The-Trump-Effect},
    pages = {175--188},
    booktitle = {Global Media Perceptions of the United States: The Trump Effect},
    publisher = {Rowman \& Littlefield Publishing},
    author = {Lee, Hyelim and Jang, Seulgi and Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
    editor = {Kamalipour, Yahya R.},
    date = {2021},
    note = {Type: Book Section},
}
```
